extraction.one_line_summary: BAUHAUS Phil won bunch sprint after recovering from early crash, holding off EWAN and MATTHEWS in final 200m
tactical_patterns: PLAPP Luke attacked for KOM points on intermediate climb with enough force to temporarily drop peloton to 21s.
MATTHEWS Michael systematically hunted intermediate sprint bonuses, closing 8-second GC gap despite not winning stage.
STRONG Corbin timed ziptrack intermediate sprint perfectly, beating MATTHEWS who opened too early despite tracking wheels.

rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: positive: recovered from massive early crash impact to win sprint, showing mental resilience lacking in previous events
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: executed targeted bonus second strategy across two intermediates despite preferring harder parcours for GC
rider_signals.MEEUS Jordy: negative: early crash eliminated pre-race sprint favorite who had just finished second at Schwalbe Classic
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: Australian champion showed KOM-hunting aggression strong enough to open 21-second gap on intermediate climb
rider_signals.STRONG Corbin: positive: superior sprint timing at intermediates, beating MATTHEWS who had better positioning but opened sprint too early
